chapter_title: Logical Alphabet and Number Sequence Test

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Place of Letter in Completely Backward Order
questions.body: If English alphabet is written in backward order, then what will be the 13th letter to the left of the 3rd letter from right?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Place of a Letter When First Half is in Backward Order
questions.body: If 1st half of the English alphabet is written in backward order, then what will be the 7th letter to the left of the 10th letter from your right?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.subtopic_name: Place of a Letter When Second Half is in Backward Order
questions.body: If 2nd half of the English alphabet is written in backward order, then what will be the 7th letter to the right of 13th letter from your left?

solutions.solution: Backward order is written as Z Y X W V U T S R Q P O N M L K J I H G F E D C B A. The 13th letter to the left of the 3rd letter from right is P.
Let us see M L K J I H G F E D C B A N O P Q R S T U V W X Y Z. The 7th letter to the left of 10th letter from our right is D.
Let us see A B C D E F G H I J K L M Z Y X W V U T S R Q P O N. The 7th letter to the right of 13 th letter from our left is T.
